# Daftar Tenaga Kependidikan Departemen Teknik Elektro dan Teknologi Informasi, FT UGM

```{r}
#| label: tbl-tendik
#| tbl-cap: "Data Tenaga Kependidikan PMPSTI FT UGM"
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(here)
library(readr)

big_table <- read_csv(
  here("appendix/data", "04_tendik.csv"),
  col_types = cols(
    No = col_integer(),
    Nama = col_character(),
    NIP = col_character(),   
    Email = col_character()
  )
)

big_table[is.na(big_table)] <- ""

if (knitr::is_html_output()) {

  library(DT)

  datatable(
    big_table,
    rownames = FALSE,
    style = "bootstrap4",
    class = "table-bordered table-hover",
    options = list(
      pageLength = 10,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = TRUE,
      columnDefs = list(
        list(className = "dt-center", targets = c(0,2))
      )
    )
  )

} else {

  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  kable(
    big_table,
    booktabs  = TRUE,
    longtable = TRUE,
    escape    = TRUE
  ) |>
    kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("striped","repeat_header","scale_down"),
      font_size = 8
    ) |>
    column_spec(1, width = "0.6cm") |>
    column_spec(2, width = "4.5cm") |>
    column_spec(3, width = "3cm") |>
    column_spec(4, width = "4cm")

}
```
